# Adventure Wargame

Introduction.

## Character Creation

Create your character.

### Attributes

Choose your attributes.

#### Body

Physical ability.

#### Agility

Speed and coordination.

#### Intellect

Knowledge and reasoning.

#### Presence

Leadership and personality.

### Skills

Choose your skills.

#### Combat

Military skills.

##### Firearms

Rifles, pistols, and carbines.

##### Heavy Weapons

Machine guns and launchers.

#### Technical

Engineering skills.

##### Electronics

Sensors and communications.

##### Mechanics

Repair vehicles and equipment.

## Equipment

Starting gear.

### Weapons

Select your weapon.

### Armor

Protective equipment.

## Combat

Combat rules.

### Initiative

Determine turn order.

### Actions

Available combat actions.

### Damage

Applying wounds.
